question: Show the years in which orchestras that have given more than one performance are founded.
gold_sql: SELECT Year_of_Founded FROM orchestra AS T1 JOIN performance AS T2 ON T1.Orchestra_ID  =  T2.Orchestra_ID GROUP BY T2.Orchestra_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.calendar_year_of_attr_dd5450 FROM orchestra AS T1 JOIN performance AS T2 ON T1.attr_8f163b_key = T2.attr_8f163b_key GROUP BY T1.attr_8f163b_key HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.calendar_year_of_attr_dd5450 FROM orchestra AS T1 JOIN performance AS T2 ON T1.attr_8f163b_key = T2.attr_8f163b_key GROUP BY T1.attr_8f163b_key HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
